title: SAMSUNG HW-S60D/XU 5.0 All-in-One Sound Bar with Dolby Atmos, DTS Virtual:X & Amazon Alexa - Black

description.main: Take movie night up a notch with this Samsung S60D sound bar. With Wireless Dolby Atmos, you'll hear every whoosh, bang and spine-chilling creak in 3D surround sound, just like the director intended. And there's not a cable in sight either. Your favourite entertainment will sound better than ever with Samsung Q-Symphony - the sounds come at you from both your soundbar and TV speakers. And SpaceFit Sound-Pro is like having your own personal sound guy at home. The built-in microphone analyses the acoustics of your room, then fine-tunes the EQ of the sound bar so it's optimised for your space.
goodToKnow: The all-in-one design has 7 speakers and a built-in subwoofer, carefully tuned by the Samsung Audio Lab
Control your sound bar using just your voice with Amazon Alexa built-in
The built-in centre speaker lets you hear every word of dialogue clearly
With WiFi and Bluetooth connectivity, play music straight from your favourite apps
